data.title: oOh!media Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting Date
data.description:
oOh media Ltd ( (AU:OML) ) just unveiled an update.

oOh!media Limited has announced that its 2025 Annual General Meeting will be held on May 15, 2025. This meeting is an important event for stakeholders as it provides an opportunity to discuss the company’s future strategies and operations, potentially impacting its industry positioning and stakeholder interests.

More about oOh media Ltd

oOh!media is a leading Out of Home media company that enhances public spaces by creating engaging environments. It helps advertisers, landlords, leaseholders, community organizations, local councils, and governments reach large and diverse public audiences through its extensive network of digital and static asset locations across Australia and New Zealand, including roadsides, retail centres, airports, train stations, bus stops, office towers, and universities.

data.title: Bialetti Industrie Corrects Corporate Events Calendar Date
data.description:
An announcement from Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. ( (IT:BIA) ) is now available.

Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. issued a correction to a previous press release regarding its 2025 corporate events calendar, clarifying that the Board of Directors meeting for approving the 2024 financial statements will occur on April 14, 2025, instead of the incorrect date previously stated. This correction ensures accurate communication of the company’s schedule, which is crucial for stakeholders and aligns with the company’s commitment to transparency and excellence.

More about Bialetti Industrie S.p.A.

Bialetti Industrie S.p.A. is a prominent Italian company and a key player in international markets, known for its iconic Bialetti brand. The company specializes in houseware products, particularly coffee preparation items like traditional and electric coffee makers, and espresso machines. Bialetti is celebrated for its blend of Italian creativity, quality, safety, and technological innovation, with a strong commitment to social and environmental responsibilities.

data.title: H&G High Conviction Ltd. Requests Trading Halt Pending Shareholder Meeting Results
data.description:
H&G High Conviction Ltd. ( (AU:HCF) ) has issued an announcement.

H&G High Conviction Limited has requested a trading halt on its securities pending the announcement of the results from its general meeting of shareholders. This meeting, scheduled for April 11, 2025, aims to consider a transaction under ASX Listing Rule 11.2. The trading halt will remain until the results are released or normal trading resumes, indicating the importance of the meeting’s outcome for the company’s future operations and market positioning.

More about H&G High Conviction Ltd.

H&G High Conviction Limited operates in the financial industry, focusing on investment management. The company is known for its high-conviction investment strategies, targeting specific market opportunities to generate significant returns for its stakeholders.

data.title: Simonds Group Announces Leadership Restructure Amid Strategic Growth
data.description:
Simonds Group Ltd. ( (AU:SIO) ) has provided an announcement.

Simonds Group Limited has announced significant changes to its leadership team, including the reappointment of Rhett Simonds as CEO while retaining his role as Executive Chair. These changes are part of the company’s strategic plan to capitalize on its strong financial turnaround post-Covid-19 and to integrate the recent acquisition of Dennis Family Homes. The leadership restructuring aims to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and market positioning, with implications for improved stakeholder value.

More about Simonds Group Ltd.

Simonds Group Limited is one of Australia’s oldest home builders, with a history spanning over 75 years. The company focuses on residential construction and has recently strengthened its market position through strategic acquisitions, such as Dennis Family Homes.

data.title: Battery X Metals Expands Exploration Efforts with New Subsidiary and Quebec Acquisition
data.description:
Battery X Metals ( (TSE:BATX) ) has provided an update.

Battery X Metals has announced the formation of a new subsidiary, Battery X Discoveries Inc., to enhance its exploration of critical battery metals across North America. This strategic move aims to secure essential materials like lithium, cobalt, and nickel, crucial for the clean energy transition and supply chain resilience. Additionally, the company has expanded its exploration portfolio in Quebec by acquiring 39 more mineral claims, strengthening its Reservoir Dozois Project. This expansion is expected to bolster the company’s long-term strategy and commitment to sustainable energy solutions.

More about Battery X Metals

Battery X Metals is an energy transition resource exploration and technology company focused on advancing domestic and critical battery metal resource exploration. The company takes a diversified approach to the battery metals industry, emphasizing exploration, lifespan extension, and recycling of lithium-ion batteries and battery materials.

Orora Ltd. has announced an update on its ongoing on-market buy-back program, with a total of 43,860,867 securities bought back before the previous day and an additional 525,544 securities bought back on the previous day. data.description:

Intelligent Monitoring Group Limited has announced a change in the location of its registry office in Sydney. Effective from April 14, 2025, the registry office of MUFG Corporate Markets (AU) Limited will move to a new address at Liberty Place, Level 41, 161 Castlereagh Street, Sydney, NSW 2000. data.title: CK Life Sciences Reports Promising Preclinical Results for TROP2 Cancer Vaccines
data.description:
CK Life Sciences International (Holdings), Inc. ( (HK:0775) ) just unveiled an announcement.

CK Life Sciences International (Holdings) Inc. has announced promising preclinical results for its novel cancer vaccines targeting TROP2, a protein overexpressed in various aggressive cancers. The vaccines have shown impressive tumor growth inhibition in mice studies, particularly in breast and colorectal cancers, and the company aims to advance these vaccines into clinical trials. The potential commercialization of these vaccines could bring significant economic benefits, although clinical trials have not yet commenced, and patent approvals are pending.

More about CK Life Sciences International (Holdings), Inc.

CK Life Sciences International (Holdings) Inc. operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on the development of cancer vaccines. The company is engaged in research and development of novel therapeutics, with a particular emphasis on targeting tumor antigens and immune checkpoint proteins.

data.title: Cleantek Industries Reports Strong Q4 2024 Results and Outlines Growth Strategy
data.description:
Cleantek Industries Inc. ( (TSE:CTEK) ) has issued an update.

Cleantek Industries Inc. reported strong financial and operational results for Q4 2024, despite a decrease in revenue due to lower activity levels. The company achieved a significant increase in net income and adjusted EBITDA, driven by strategic realignment and operational efficiencies. Cleantek is poised for growth in 2025, with plans to expand its fleet, explore international markets, and introduce new technologies like EcoSteam and DZeroE to meet rising demand in wastewater treatment and sustainable lighting.

More about Cleantek Industries Inc.

Cleantek Industries Inc. is an innovative provider of patented clean technology solutions focused on reducing cost and carbon intensity in the wastewater management and industrial lighting sectors. The company targets markets such as oil and gas, midstream, mining, industrial, and construction, with a commitment to sustainable and cost-effective solutions.

data.title: Dart Mining Advances Coonambula Antimony-Gold Project with Successful Due Diligence
data.description:
Dart Mining NL ( (AU:DTM) ) has issued an announcement.

Dart Mining NL has successfully completed its due diligence on the Coonambula Antimony-Gold Project in Queensland, marking a significant step in its agreement with Great Divide Mining Limited. This development allows Dart Mining to earn an initial 51% interest in the project, which includes plans for drilling to establish a JORC-compliant resource at the Banshee Antimony Mine. The strategic location of the Coonambula project near Dart’s flagship Triumph Gold Project enhances its regional presence and potential impact on the company’s operations and market positioning.

More about Dart Mining NL

Dart Mining NL is a company involved in the exploration and development of mineral resources, with a focus on gold and antimony projects. The company is working on establishing a regional presence in Queensland, Australia, through advanced stage intrusion-related and epithermal gold projects, including the Triumph Gold Project and the Coonambula Antimony-Gold Project.

Average Trading Volume: 664,808

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$3.09M
